name: Conference-Driven Return Drift
signal_rule: buy 2 trading days before a major tech conference start (D-2), hold through 2 trading days after conference end (D+2)
claimed_metric: annualized return 6.67%, vol 6.88%, Sharpe 0.97, max drawdown -12.78%
verdict: REJECT (Case 61): long-only 0.63 < buy-hold-3-names 1.06 = compressed beta; beta-hedged 0.54 full but recency-concentrated (neg 2016-18,2020), 29 events tiny sample
notes: Novel strategy based on specific event-driven signals; feasible as it only requires daily price data.

name: Market-Neutral Conference Strategy
signal_rule: long the conference stock and short SPY simultaneously during D-2..D+2
claimed_metric: lower return but reduced drawdown and market independence
notes: Requires shorting SPY, which may not be feasible on Alpaca due to constraints.

name: Multi-Factor Market-Neutral Strategy
signal_rule: Run a Lasso regression of next-month returns on 11 factors over the trailing year to get coefficients; rank stocks by expected return; long top 40, short bottom 40.
notes: Requires L2 data for accurate factor calculation and regression analysis.
